children.label: B
children.text: is based on the relative needs of the area in which the project will be located, as determined in accordance with regulations promulgated by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In determining the amount of the non-Federal share of the cost of a project, the Secretary may provide credit toward the non-Federal share for all contributions both in cash and in-kind, fairly evaluated, including contributions of space, equipment, assumptions of debt, and services.

children.heading: Regional Commission funds
children.label: 2 Regional Commission funds
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, any funds contributed by a Regional Commission for a project under this subchapter may be considered to be part of the non-Federal share of the costs of the project.

children.heading: Indian tribes
children.label: 1 Indian tribes
children.text: In the case of a grant to an Indian tribe for a project under this subchapter, the Secretary may increase the Federal share above the percentage specified in subsection (a) up to 100 percent of the cost of the project.

children.heading: Certain States, political subdivisions, and nonprofit organizations
children.label: 2 Certain States, political subdivisions, and nonprofit organizations
children.text: In the case of a grant to a State, or a political subdivision of a State, that the Secretary determines has exhausted the effective taxing and borrowing capacity of the State or political subdivision or can otherwise document that no local matching funds are reasonably obtainable, or in the case of a grant to a nonprofit organization that the Secretary determines has exhausted the effective borrowing capacity of the nonprofit organization, the Secretary may increase the Federal share above the percentage specified in subsection (a) up to 100 percent of the cost of the project.

children.heading: Training, research, and technical assistance
children.label: 3 Training, research, and technical assistance
children.text: In the case of a grant provided under section 3143 or 3147 of this title, the Secretary may increase the Federal share above the percentage specified in subsection (a) up to 100 percent of the cost of the project.

children.heading: Small communities
children.label: 4 Small communities
children.text: In the case of a grant to a political subdivision of a State (as described in ) that has a population of fewer than 10,000 residents and meets 1 or more of the eligibility criteria described in , the Secretary may increase the Federal share under paragraph (1) up to 100 percent of the total cost of the project.section 3122(6)(A)(iv) of this titlesection 3161(a) of this title
